description_long: This lamppost features a tall, hexagonal column with a robust base, supporting an ornate, curved arm adorned with decorative scrollwork. The arm extends outward and holds a single lantern-style lamp head, which is enclosed in a classic, multi-paneled housing with a pointed finial on top. The lamp head is suspended from a small hook at the end of the arm, evoking a vintage Victorian or Edwardian streetlight aesthetic. The entire structure is finished in a matte black color, giving it a timeless and elegant appearance suitable for parks, sidewalks, or historic urban districts. The scrollwork and ornamental details enhance its visual appeal, making it both functional and decorative. The lamppost appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely cast iron or steel, with glass panels in the lamp head.
description: A tall, black lamppost with ornate scrollwork and a hanging lantern-style lamp head, evoking a classic Victorian streetlight. The design is both decorative and functional, with a robust base and elegant curves.
description_view_0: The lamppost is seen from a three-quarter angle, highlighting the ornate scrollwork and the hanging lantern on the right side.
description_view_1: A direct side view showing the narrow profile of the post and the lantern hanging at the far end, with minimal scrollwork visible.
description_view_2: The opposite three-quarter angle, displaying the scrollwork and lantern on the left side, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: A frontal view with the lantern centered, showing the full width of the lamp head and the post behind it.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic lantern-style with multi-paneled glass and a pointed finial, reminiscent of Victorian streetlights.
